title: ようこそ、バブリーランドへ

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Time to let loose and groove it! Woohoo!
Whoooa!

On our day off, we decide to visit Bubblyland, a
pool resort Maruzensky had frequented ever
since she was little.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I've worked up a good sweat! Sorry about
the holdup.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I've worked up a good sweat! Sorry about
the holdup.

From the retro facilities to the guests'
old-fashioned costumes, everything looks like
we've traveled back in time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Do the outfits catch your eye? You can rent
one if you want!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They've got shoulder-padded blazers, bodycon
dresses, and nice baggy suits!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's even an option to get your hair done. You
can get it crimped or styled like a bob. It's so hip!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My first time here, I got up on stage with my mom
and danced in a bodycon.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I remember getting mad over how it would keep
slipping since I wasn't quite big enough to fill it
out yet.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, talk about a blast from the past.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I think it should be starting right about
now.
Ding, dong....

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"The all-you-can-eat tiramisu contest will be
starting soon at the Bubbly Cafe. We hope to see
you there."

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, let's stuff ourselves silly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mm-mmm, that was delicious! But I sure can't
pack down the sweets like I used to.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know, I actually won the contest when I was a
kid.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. ♪ Once, my competition got pretty close. I
had to switch to beast mode.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But it wasn't a problem since the sweets were all
so good. I was able to keep eating and eating.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've put those hunger pangs at bay,
it's finally time to hit the pool. Let's make like a
banana and split! ♪

She must really like it here. Watching her be this
free-spirited puts a smile on my face.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wahoo! Come on! Keep your eyes ahead so you
don't slip or hit something!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wahoo! Come on! Keep your eyes ahead so you
don't slip or hit something!
Splash!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That was fun! I just can't get enough of that
speed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Lemme think... You know, I do remember riding
the slide over and over after dancing with my
mom.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We were totally hooked. Haha, that sure takes
me back.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're right about that. People often say we seem
more like friends than family.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Now that I think about it, it's been a while since
we came here together.

As she says this, Maruzensky's voice begins to
soften just slightly.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we haven't been talking very much
recently. I wonder if my mom is doing okay...

It's rare to see Maruzensky feeling down. I make
an impromptu suggestion.
choice_data_list: Let's send her a wonderful picture!
Let's buy her an amazing souvenir!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what a great idea! I'm sure she'll love seeing
all the new things they've added here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've decided, let's go find us some
wonderful locations!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh, look at this sweet ride! What a chick
magnet, am I right? This'll make a rad photo spot!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go! Come get in the picture too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go! Come get in the picture too!
Click!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Bubbly!
Click!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's get it popping tonight! ♪
Click!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think these turned out quite well! Our smiles
look great. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think these turned out quite well! Our smiles
look great. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I hope this brings back good memories for my
mom.

As Maruzensky flicks through the photos, a little
smile appears on her face.

The next day, we discover Maruzensky had been
holding her phone upside down for all the photos,
but that's a story for another day.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! There's a lot of stuff here that my
mom likes!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've decided, let's hit the souvenir
shop! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's down to either this chain-handle bag or this
leather bucket bag! Oh, but this brooch is really
fetching too...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They're even selling a bodycon set that comes
with its very own fan! I'd love one for myself!
Gosh, I'm totally stumped!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...What do you think about going for something
like this Bubbly manju? The silver dragees on top
make it ever so sparkly!

We check several other places after that, but
nothing we see seems to click.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what do I do? I'm not sure what would make
her really happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, this song sounds so familiar. I've
definitely heard it—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Jeepers! My mom used to play this song in the car
all the time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But the tape gave out and we haven't listened to
it since.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Why not give her this song as a present?
That record shop over there should have it in
stock!

We hurry over, and sure enough, find the
cassette. The clerk gift wraps it for us, and then a
few days later...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Mom really liked it. She's been listening to
it nonstop.

Maruzensky smiles brightly as she shares the good
news with me.
